scripts.supabase:types: bunx supabase gen types typescript --local > apps/frontend/src/lib/supabase/gen.types.ts && biome check --write apps/frontend/src/lib/supabase/gen.types.ts
scripts.supabase:types:ci: test -n "$POSTGRES_URL" && bunx supabase gen types typescript --db-url "$POSTGRES_URL" > apps/frontend/src/lib/supabase/gen.types.ts && biome check --write apps/frontend/src/lib/supabase/gen.types.ts
